resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 2 BHK apartment is located in the prestigious Jaypee Greens Pavilion Court in Sector 128, Noida. Designed to offer a world-class living experience within the expansive Jaypee Wish Town township, this residence perfectly blends modern luxury with the tranquility of lush green surroundings, making it an ideal choice for families and professionals.Property SpecificationsThis well-designed residence features a super built-up area of 1017 sq. ft. and is situated on a middle floor of a twelve-storey building. The layout is thoughtfully planned to maximise space and natural light, featuring two spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms. The interiors are finished with high-quality vitrified tiles in the living and dining areas, while the bedrooms feature elegant wooden laminated flooring. The apartment is equipped with split air-conditioning units and a modular kitchen with granite counters. Private balconies offer pleasant views of the beautifully landscaped grounds and the nearby golf course, ensuring a bright and airy atmosphere.FacilitiesJaypee Greens Pavilion Court provides an extensive range of premium amenities tailored for a comfortable lifestyle. Residents have access to a dedicated clubhouse, a fully equipped gymnasium, and a swimming pool. The project is situated amidst a vast 18-hole signature golf course, providing unique recreational opportunities. Essential services include 24-hour power backup, a piped gas line, and an advanced multi-level security system with CCTV surveillance. The complex also offers ample underground parking, high-speed elevators, and professionally maintained gardens with a dedicated childrens play area and jogging tracks.LocalityThe property is located in a prime residential neighbourhood in Sector 128, ensuring excellent connectivity via the Noida-Greater Noida Expressway. It is situated in close proximity to major corporate hubs and educational institutions like the Prometheus School and Step by Step School. Healthcare needs are well-catered for by the nearby Jaypee Hospital, which is just a short drive away. For shopping and entertainment, the Starling Mall and various local markets are easily accessible. The locality is well-served by public transport, with the Okhla Bird Sanctuary and Sector 137 Metro Stations providing seamless access to the rest of the National Capital Region.
